name: West Wits Mining Limited
description: West Wits Mining Limited is an Australia-based company focused on the exploration, development, and production of high-value precious and base metals. The company’s primary asset is the Witwatersrand Basin Project (WBP) in South Africa, a significant gold project located in the Central Rand Goldfield. Additionally, the company holds the Mt Cecelia Project in Western Australia. West Wits is committed to delivering value to shareholders and local communities through responsible mining practices, leveraging its expertise to advance projects from exploration through to production, with a particular emphasis on long-term gold production growth.
